# Book 1 Philosophy Propagation Plan

Source model: `PhilosophyPropagationPlan` in `lib/domain/chapter-composition.ts`.

## Active Idea Lines

- continuity versus fracture
- land as teacher
- memory as authority
- reading signs correctly
- movement without surrender
- trade/contact as warning and possibility
- belonging and obligation
- survival without identity collapse

## Chapter 1 Example

```json
{
  "artifact": "philosophy_propagation_plan",
  "chapterId": "book1-chapter-01",
  "activePhilosophyThreadIds": [
    "book1-philosophy-reading-signs",
    "book1-continuity-survival"
  ],
  "explicitnessCeiling": 0.31,
  "preferredCarrierModes": [
    "action_pattern",
    "consequence_pattern",
    "warning_pattern",
    "memory_comparison",
    "scene_contrast"
  ],
  "nextEchoOpportunities": [
    "book1-chapter-01-scene-02",
    "book1-chapter-01-scene-03"
  ],
  "sceneLevelPlacementSuggestions": [
    {
      "scenePlanId": "book1-chapter-01-scene-02",
      "suggestion": "Carry worldview through warning pattern and character reaction, not lecture."
    },
    {
      "scenePlanId": "book1-chapter-01-scene-03",
      "suggestion": "Embed idea thread in action timing and what characters notice first."
    }
  ],
  "delayedPayoffPotential": 0.65
}
```

## Guardrail

The plan intentionally suppresses direct moralizing and requires meaning to travel via observed behavior, consequence, memory contrast, and repeated place-linked signals.
